description: Started my career in the operating room selling spinal implant systems to orthopedic and neurosurgeons.
Grew enterprise revenue for a Techstars-backed healthtech startup selling Bluetooth asset tracking into hospital systems.
Co-founded a Web3 wellness platform from zero.
Overhauled digital marketing for a neurosurgical and pain management group in South Florida.
Led growth at an AI-powered revenue platform automating inbound, outbound, and customer support.
Leading sales and marketing for a precision CNC machining and hermetic connector manufacturer.
